name: densityCalc
_note: urban-planning.densityCalc is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/urbanplanning.js, PATH-3, hyphenated key). DETERMINISTIC: population/area → populationDensity, housingUnits/area → housingDensity, classified on fixed thresholds (>10000 urban-core, >3000 urban, >1000 suburban else rural) with transit viability (>5000 rail, >2000 bus else car-dependent). Empty input defaults areaSqMiles to 1 so there is no divide-by-zero. Reads input from artifact.data; no DB, no network. LENS_ACTIONS-only → not driven by the macro-assassin; pinned by server/tests/urban-planning-lens-macros.test.js.
